## Description

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link related issues: "Fixes #123". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test` and `cargo test`)
- [ ] Lint and formatting are clean (`npm run lint`, `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] A changeset is included for user-facing changes (`npx changeset`) — skip for docs/CI-only changes
- [ ] README / docs updated if options or behavior changed
